data.name: ComeCloser
data.detailed_description:
Four years of community-driven development, 23 massive updates, and the support of our 15,000+ passionate backers — ComeCloser is now a polished, deeply replayable experience, crafted for your pleasure every step of the way.

A private space where you can be yourself and play according to your mood. Your actions and desires come to life, your fantasies are at your fingertips, let your imagination guide you…

Immerse yourself like never before. Every gesture, every touch is translated seamlessly into the virtual world though our motion replication technology. It's like magic, but better.

So smooth you won’t believe it! Feel the difference of our cutting-edge tech in your fingers with soft skin, silky hair, realistic clothes… Every detail is crafted to ensure you feel satisfied, every moment.

ComeCloser is primarily designed for VR lovers, but delicious with a mouse and keyboard too. Whether you're going full immersion or staying comfortable at your desk, your favorite characters are ready to play whenever you are.

Everything is one click away. Enjoy a sandbox where all the features are available at once, handcrafted to offer a smooth and pleasant experience with long-lasting replayability. Focus on what really matters : your pleasure.

data.short_description: Meet playful characters in this kinky sandbox for VR and desktop. Dive into fun and spicy handcrafted situations, toy with silky‑soft physics, explore lifelike interactions with game-changing motion tracking, and roleplay your next date exactly how you wish it went.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows7/10 64bits
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 / AMD FX-8350
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX1660ti / RTX3050 / AMD RX5600XT / RX6600
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR headsets and controllers + Vive Trackers
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows7/10 64bits
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-9600K / AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA RTX3060 / AMD RX5700XT / RX6700XT
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR headsets and controllers + Vive Trackers

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows7/10 64bits
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-4590 / AMD FX-8350
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX1660ti / RTX3050 / AMD RX5600XT / RX6600
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • VR Support: SteamVR headsets and controllers + Vive Trackers
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows7/10 64bits
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-9600K / AMD Ryzen 5 3600
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA RTX3060 / AMD RX5700XT / RX6700XT
  • Storage: 15 GB available space
  • VR Support: SteamVR headsets and controllers + Vive Trackers
